# Diablo4Storage.EnumerateItemTypes method

Enumerate every item base type (group ItemType = 98), each decoded + classified — the dictionary a gear/item API filters (e.g. `.Where(t => t.Class == ItemClass.Weapon)`). Ordered as the CoreTOC lists the group; unreadable records are skipped.
